name: Nonresident Marital Deduction

eligibility.description: Available to nonresident non-citizens; typically requires the use of a Qualified Domestic Trust (QDOT) if the surviving spouse is not a U.S. citizen.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a marital deduction for property situated in the U.S. under the principles of section 2056.
